subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! That which thou hadst written to Jinab-i-Manshadí hath been perused
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید و از نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution
